content.text: A new feature has been added to display the client on received messages in memory.
Fixed an excessive gap between chat messages and corrected a typo from 'flex-column' to 'flex-col'.

A new feature has been introduced to salt agent secrets using the `SECRET_SALT` environment variable. If the variable is not set, a default value is used, but an error message prompts users to configure it properly.

An issue has been reported where the Twitter agent is not replying to all accounts listed in the `TWITTER_TARGET_USERS` environment variable. Out of 52 accounts, only 15-20 receive responses, and the user is seeking help to resolve this inconsistency.

categories.title: CLI Test Enhancements and Development Updates

content.text: A new set of CLI tests has been added to improve test coverage and ensure the correct functionality of CLI commands. These tests focus on setup commands, agent commands, and customizations. The changes are categorized as improvements and do not require updates to project documentation. The testing process involves running specific test commands within the CLI package and verifying their success.

Development efforts have also focused on package improvements, including enhancements to memory handling for received messages. Additionally, new features related to message memory were introduced. A total of seven contributors merged three pull requests, contributing to various improvements across the project.
The current price of Wrapped Bitcoin (WBTC) is $87,342.96, reflecting its value in the market.
The current price of ai16z is $0.2004, indicating its latest market valuation.

categories.title: Recent Updates and Fixes in ElizaOS

content.text: A new feature was introduced to display the client on received messages in memory, improving visibility and debugging.
A security enhancement was added to salt agent secrets using the `SECRET_SALT` environment variable, ensuring better protection of sensitive data.
A fix was implemented to encrypt character secrets when adding or updating them from the GUI, improving security.
A user reported an issue where the Twitter agent was not replying to all accounts listed in the `TWITTER_TARGET_USERS` environment variable, only responding to 15-20 out of 52 accounts.
CLI tests were added to improve test coverage for setup commands, agent commands, and customizations, ensuring better reliability of CLI functionality.
A UI fix was made to reduce excessive gaps between chat messages and correct a typo from 'flex-column' to 'flex-col'.
The handling of SOL addresses in plugin-solana actions was refactored to use environment variables, improving configuration flexibility and fixing a logic issue in transfer content judgment.
